narrative:
Anderson Twp. township has 34,967 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.1 percentage points.
